details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that meets all rubric requirements. The agent successfully added json_path support by: (1) creating a new `json_path_to_json_schema()` function that converts JSONPath expressions to JSON Schema, (2) registering it in grammar_manager.py alongside existing constraints (regex, json_schema, ebnf), (3) adding json_path parameters throughout the IR layer (api.py, ir.py, sampling_params.py), (4) integrating it into protocol and entrypoint layers, and (5) including comprehensive unit tests (218 lines covering various patterns). The implementation follows the same constraint pattern as existing constraints and handles the conversion elegantly by leveraging the existing JSON schema constraint infrastructure. Minor deduction only because the JSONPath converter uses a simplified regex-based tokenizer that supports only a subset of JSONPath syntax (no recursive descent, etc.), though this is documented and intentional.
